title: Upper Triangular Ones
description:
Implement `triu(j)`, which returns a $j \times j$ matrix of ones on and above the main diagonal (upper triangular, inclusive):

$$\text{triu}(j)_{r,c} = \begin{cases} 1 & c \geq r \\ 0 & c < r \end{cases}$$

**Input**: `j` (python int, the size). **Output**: shape `[j, j]`.

Solve with broadcasting only — compare row/column index vectors, no `torch.triu`.
starter_code:
import torch

def triu(j):
    # Return the j x j upper-triangular-ones matrix (including diagonal) without torch.triu.
    pass
hints: Solve in 1 line using broadcasting only.
Compare a column vector of row indices against a row vector of column indices with <=.

solutions.name: Broadcasted row/column comparison
solutions.explanation: Broadcasting `arange(j)` as a column of row indices against `arange(j)` as a row of column indices gives a $[j,j]$ grid; the entry at $(r,c)$ is `True` exactly when $r \leq c$, matching the upper-triangular-inclusive pattern once cast to an integer dtype.
